title: First Byron Stop
summary: A short note from the road near Byron Bay.
body: This is a sample point of interest. Each POI can become a small blog entry tied to a precise spot on the map.
Use this structure for campsite notes, favourite beaches, repairs, hikes, cafes, people you met, or anything else worth remembering.

title: Sydney Launch
summary: A sample origin story for the beginning of the route.
body: This is another example POI. The content is just static JSON, so adding a new story is as simple as adding one more object to the file.
Coordinates are stored as GeoJSON-style longitude and latitude: [longitude, latitude].

title: Goonengerry National Park Loop
summary: A sample hike story connected to the hikes overlay.
body: This POI points at the same place as the imported Komoot hike. You can use the hike overlay for the route and this story card for photos, notes, and a more personal recap.
Add hike photos under a folder like poi-media/goonengerry-hike/ and reference them in the images list.
